title: Pulque Hacienda Experience
description: Step into the legacy of Mexico’s ancient fermented drink with a guided tour through a traditional pulque hacienda. Learn about maguey cultivation, taste seasonal varieties, and explore the rustic beauty of the countryside.

title: Ajolote Conservation Center
description: A unique ecological space dedicated to the preservation of Mexico’s iconic amphibian. Visitors can observe axolotls in their natural habitat, learn about their biology, and support local conservation efforts

title: Sendero del Mezquital
description: A scenic hiking trail that winds through semi-arid landscapes, native flora, and panoramic viewpoints. Ideal for nature lovers and photographers, it offers a peaceful escape just minutes from the town center.
